reviews.review_title: Issue with MR Mode on Quest 3S – Missing
reviews.review_description:
I am experiencing a problem when playing your game on my Quest 3S.
When I switch to MR Mode, I only get the sound effects and explosion visuals, but the aircraft itself does not appear at all.

This makes the gameplay incomplete and unplayable in MR Mode.
Could you please look into this issue and advise if there is a fix or update available?

developer_response.body: Hi, we’re sorry to hear you’re experiencing issues. Let us know if things are better with the new version (it’s already available in the store). We’re still actively working on the MR mode.

reviews.review_title: Good game but after around the 4th level
reviews.review_description: Ok so it’s really fun for its price but on the 3rd city it starts to really lag like 2 frames a second bad it’s unplayable on that level basically and I’m not sure how to beat it while lagging to unlock the next level

developer_response.body: Hey, we've fixed that bug, sorry for the inconvenience!

reviews.review_description: A great game (especially for the price). There are a lot of levels, but you have to be careful on the higher difficulty because you can really work up a sweat.

This game came out great! This game reminds me of a game I used to play back in the days called rampage! Would love to thank the Developers of this game for adding a smooth turn around and the way they made it go sprint continuously! This is a great game with great graphics and a lots of fun to play with. I can't wait until they add more into the game!
This is an awesome game! 
you will not be disappointed!
This game is so fun I love doing all the levels and going into mixed reality it is SOO FUN yall should try this game out you can destroy everything.

reviews.review_title: Different hands would be neat. Good game
reviews.review_description: I like this game but it needs more stuff to do and modes. I also want to have Kaiju hands instead of the stinky green.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your comment. In the last update we added other types of hands, now there are 4 different ones available. Hope you will like one of them better :)

reviews.review_description: It's a cool feeling to take on the role of a monster and destroy literally everything. But on higher difficulty levels you can get a little sweaty :)
Fun, cheap game, but mixed reality mode is not working at all on Quest 3.  I get black screen with sounds only. No passthrough. Full VR mode works fine though.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback ! There was a bug in the last update which we have already fixed, when you have the latest version MR mode will work. Sorry for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description:
Pick up detection is not good and destroying buildings is so random if it lets you destroy a building or grab one .

Either that tutorial is lying on how controls work.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the feedback. Sorry to hear you are having such problems. You can catch the building only game you hold grab button, building you can destroy as you hit it with enough speed (you don't have to press anything).  Let me know if I can help you in any way, or email me and we can try to solve what is causing your problems.

reviews.review_description: I love the last update, more levels and many achievements to get.

This is one of the more fun games that I've played in VR. You can destroy everything, throw chunks of buildings, tanks, helicopters, and drones.  Slow down time and catch missiles!  Seriously a lot of fun.

Good game! A little stupid bots that run away from me, run into the edge of the map and continue to run in place, but I still liked it. This is a fun game to play after a hard day at work. The only thing is, I would like to see my hands as the hands of a monster, and not human hands.

developer_response.body: Hi, definitely NPC reactions will be improved and a new hand model will be added this month. Thank you for your feedback !
